name: ptbr_narrative_reflective
text: Ele decidiu ir embora sem avisar. Não por falta de coragem, mas porque às vezes partir em silêncio evita se perder explicando demais. Na mochila, levava um caderno, uma foto antiga e uma pergunta que nunca se resolveu.

name: ptbr_professional_bio
text: Profissional de marketing com experiência em branding, posicionamento, performance e comunicação para marcas digitais. Há mais de oito anos desenvolvo estratégias orientadas por dados, com foco em crescimento sustentável, diferenciação e conexão com o público.

name: en_reflective_narrative
text: He left without telling anyone. Not because he was afraid, but because silence sometimes feels safer than one more explanation. In his bag there was a notebook, an old photograph, and a question that never really found an answer.

name: en_professional_bio
text: Marketing professional with experience in branding, positioning, performance, and communication strategy for digital brands. Over the past eight years I have built data-informed strategies focused on sustainable growth, market differentiation, and audience connection.

name: british_banter_complaint
text: This still sounds too polished and a bit lifeless.

name: british_professional_bio
text: Experienced strategist working across brand positioning, messaging, and growth. I help companies clarify what they stand for and turn strategy into work that actually lands.

name: casual_us_human_note
text: This still reads too clean and too generic. It doesn't sound like something a real person would actually say.
